briefing_zh:
今天 AI 研究的焦点集中在**扩散模型训练优化**和**AI Agent 架构**两大方向。**Mean Mode Screaming** 提出均值-方差分裂残差方法，首次实现 1000 层扩散模型的稳定训练，获得 HuggingFace 社区最高关注（102 票），标志着超深扩散网络训练迈入新阶段。**Flow-OPD** 则在流匹配蒸馏上取得突破，展现出"超越教师"的涌现能力，4 步生成即达多任务 0.9044 分。

Agent 生态持续升温。GitHub 上 **strukto-ai/mirage** 以近 2000 星的爆发式增长引领本周，其统一虚拟文件系统为 AI Agent 提供了标准化的数据访问层。alphaxiv 热榜上 **SkillOS** 和 **RAO（递归代理优化）** 分别从技能复用和递归委托两个角度推进 Agent 能力边界，后者在上下文受限任务上达到 95% 成功率。

Hacker News 上关于 AI 编程代理的讨论趋于务实——排名第一的文章强调 AI 代码代理需要降低维护成本而非单纯追求生成速度，反映出行业从"AI 能写代码"向"AI 写的代码能维护"的认知转变。多 Agent 代码审查工具 **adamsreview** 和 Agent 版本控制系统 **re_gent** 则代表了工具链层面的创新。
briefing_en:
Today's AI research landscape centers on **diffusion model training optimization** and **AI Agent architectures**. **Mean Mode Screaming** introduces mean-variance split residuals enabling stable training of 1000-layer diffusion models, earning the highest community attention on HuggingFace (102 upvotes) and marking a new era for ultra-deep diffusion networks. **Flow-OPD** achieves a breakthrough in flow matching distillation with emergent "teacher-surpassing" capability at just 4 generation steps.

The Agent ecosystem continues to heat up. On GitHub, **strukto-ai/mirage** leads the week with nearly 2,000 stars, offering a unified virtual filesystem as a standardized data access layer for AI agents. On alphaxiv, **SkillOS** and **RAO (Recursive Agent Optimization)** push agent capability boundaries from skill reuse and recursive delegation perspectives respectively, with RAO achieving 95% success on context-constrained tasks.

Hacker News discussions on AI coding agents are turning pragmatic — the top article emphasizes that AI code agents must reduce maintenance costs rather than just generation speed, reflecting an industry shift from "AI can write code" to "AI-written code must be maintainable." Tools like **adamsreview** for multi-agent PR reviews and **re_gent** for agent version control represent toolchain-level innovation.
viral_analysis_zh: **strukto-ai/mirage** 最有潜力成为爆款——"AI Agent 的统一文件系统"切中了当前 Agent 开发中数据访问碎片化的痛点，概念简洁易传播，一周近 2000 星的增速证明了市场需求。其次是 Mean Mode Screaming，"1000 层扩散模型"这个数字本身就具有传播力。
viral_analysis_en: **strukto-ai/mirage** has the highest viral potential — "unified filesystem for AI agents" addresses the real pain point of fragmented data access in agent development, with a clean concept that's easy to spread. Nearly 2,000 stars in a week validates market demand. Runner-up is Mean Mode Screaming, where the "1000-layer diffusion model" number alone carries strong memetic value.

huggingface_papers.title: Mean Mode Screaming: Mean--Variance Split Residuals for 1000-Layer Diffusion Transformers
huggingface_papers.tldr: Introduces mean-variance split residuals that enable stable training of 1000-layer diffusion models. This architectural innovation eliminates gradient pathologies in ultra-deep networks, achieving state-of-the-art generation quality. The method requires no auxiliary losses or special initialization, making deep diffusion training practical for the first time.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 提出均值-方差分裂残差方法，首次实现 1000 层扩散模型的稳定训练。该架构创新消除了超深网络中的梯度病理问题，无需辅助损失或特殊初始化即可达到 SOTA 生成质量，使深层扩散训练首次变得可行。

huggingface_papers.title: MACE-Dance: Motion-Appearance Cascaded Experts for Music-Driven Dance Video Generation
huggingface_papers.tldr: A cascaded expert framework for music-driven dance video generation, decoupling motion and appearance synthesis. Uses separate expert networks for temporal coherence and visual fidelity, achieving significantly better dance-music alignment than prior methods.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 提出运动-外观级联专家框架用于音乐驱动的舞蹈视频生成，将运动合成和外观合成解耦。使用独立的专家网络分别保证时序一致性和视觉保真度，在舞蹈-音乐对齐上大幅超越先前方法。
huggingface_papers.authors: Kaixing Yang, Jiashu Zhu, Xulong Tang

huggingface_papers.title: Flow-OPD: On-Policy Distillation for Flow Matching Models
huggingface_papers.tldr: On-policy distillation method for flow matching models that achieves multi-task score of 0.9044 with emergent teacher-surpassing capability. By training on the student's own generated trajectories rather than teacher's, it avoids distribution mismatch and enables 4-step high-fidelity generation.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 流匹配模型的在策略蒸馏方法，多任务得分 0.9044，展现出超越教师模型的涌现能力。通过在学生自身生成的轨迹上训练而非教师轨迹，避免了分布失配，实现 4 步高保真生成。
huggingface_papers.authors: Zhen Fang, Wenxuan Huang, Yu Zeng

huggingface_papers.title: HyperEyes: Dual-Grained Efficiency-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Parallel Multimodal Search Agents
huggingface_papers.tldr: A dual-grained efficiency-aware RL framework for parallel multi-model LLM inference. HyperEyes dynamically allocates compute across multiple models based on task difficulty, reducing total inference cost while maintaining quality through learned routing policies.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 面向并行多模型 LLM 推理的双粒度效率感知强化学习框架。HyperEyes 根据任务难度动态分配多模型计算资源，通过学习的路由策略在保持质量的同时降低总推理成本。
huggingface_papers.authors: Guankai Li, Jiabin Chen, Yi Xu

huggingface_papers.title: Listwise Policy Optimization: Group-based RLVR as Target-Projection on the LLM Response Simplex
huggingface_papers.tldr: Reframes group-based RLVR as target-projection optimization on the LLM response manifold. Listwise Policy Optimization treats candidate responses as a ranked list rather than pairwise comparisons, achieving better alignment with human preferences and more stable training dynamics.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 将基于组的 RLVR 重新建模为 LLM 响应流形上的目标投影优化。列表式策略优化将候选响应视为排序列表而非成对比较，实现更好的人类偏好对齐和更稳定的训练动态。
huggingface_papers.authors: Yun Qu, Qi Wang, Yixiu Mao

alphaxiv_papers.title: SkillOS: Experience-Driven RL for LLM Agents with Auto-Curated Reusable Skills
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: An experience-driven RL framework that enables LLM agents to automatically curate and reuse skills for continuous self-evolution. Achieves state-of-the-art performance by building a growing library of transferable action sequences from past interactions.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 一个经验驱动的强化学习框架，使 LLM 代理能够自动整理和复用技能以实现持续自我进化。通过从过去交互中构建可迁移的动作序列库，达到最先进性能。

alphaxiv_papers.title: RAO: Recursive Agent Optimization for LLM Recursive Delegation
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Trains LLMs for recursive task delegation, achieving 95% success on context-constrained tasks. RAO teaches models to break complex problems into subtasks and delegate to child agents, enabling effective multi-level agent hierarchies.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 训练 LLM 进行递归任务委托，在上下文受限任务上达到 95% 成功率。RAO 教会模型将复杂问题分解为子任务并委托给子代理，实现有效的多层级代理体系。

alphaxiv_papers.title: THINC: Code as Primary Reasoning Engine for Competition Mathematics
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: A 4B parameter model that uses code as its primary reasoning engine, achieving 78.1% average accuracy on competition math and outperforming its 27B teacher by 13.4 percentage points. Demonstrates that code-based reasoning can dramatically amplify smaller models' capabilities.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 一个 40 亿参数模型将代码作为主要推理引擎，在竞赛数学上达到 78.1% 平均准确率，超越 270 亿参数教师模型 13.4 个百分点。证明基于代码的推理能大幅增强小模型能力。

alphaxiv_papers.title: AI Co-Mathematician: Agent-Based Mathematical Research Workbench
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Google DeepMind's agent-based workbench for mathematical research that solved 23 out of 48 FrontierMath Tier 4 problems. Combines specialized mathematical tools with LLM reasoning in an interactive research environment.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Google DeepMind 的代理式数学研究工作台，解决了 FrontierMath Tier 4 中 48 道题的 23 道。将专业数学工具与 LLM 推理结合在交互式研究环境中。

alphaxiv_papers.title: PAE: Prior-Aligned AutoEncoders with 13x Faster Convergence
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Prior-Aligned AutoEncoders from SJTU and Alibaba achieve 13x faster convergence and gFID 1.03 on ImageNet 256×256. By aligning the latent space with diffusion priors during autoencoder training, it dramatically reduces downstream generation training cost.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 上海交大与阿里巴巴提出先验对齐自编码器，收敛速度提升 13 倍，ImageNet 256×256 上 gFID 达 1.03。通过在自编码器训练中对齐潜空间与扩散先验，大幅降低下游生成训练成本。

github_repos.name: strukto-ai/mirage
github_repos.tldr: A unified virtual filesystem abstraction layer for AI agents, providing standardized file operations across local, cloud, and API-based storage backends. Enables agents to seamlessly read/write data regardless of underlying storage, solving the fragmentation problem in agent data access.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 面向 AI Agent 的统一虚拟文件系统抽象层，提供跨本地、云端和 API 存储后端的标准化文件操作。使代理无论底层存储如何都能无缝读写数据，解决了代理数据访问碎片化问题。

github_repos.name: darkrishabh/agent-skills-eval
github_repos.tldr: A test runner and evaluation framework for AI agent skills, compatible with agentskills.io benchmarks. Provides structured assessment of agent capabilities across coding, reasoning, and tool-use dimensions with reproducible scoring.
github_repos.tldr_zh: AI 代理技能的测试运行器和评估框架，兼容 agentskills.io 基准。提供跨编码、推理和工具使用维度的结构化代理能力评估，支持可复现的评分。

github_repos.name: TQ-trade-agent/tq-trading-agent
github_repos.tldr: AI-powered multi-agent stock research and trading strategy orchestration system. Uses specialized agents for market analysis, risk assessment, and trade execution in a coordinated pipeline.
github_repos.tldr_zh: AI 驱动的多代理股票研究与交易策略编排系统。使用专门的代理进行市场分析、风险评估和交易执行的协调管线。

github_repos.name: ChristianJR19/GoblinOS
github_repos.tldr: A personality layer for Hermes Agent that replaces the default identity with a customizable character, demonstrating extensible agent persona design patterns for open-source AI assistants.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 为 Hermes Agent 设计的个性层，用可定制角色替换默认身份，展示了开源 AI 助手的可扩展代理人格设计模式。

github_repos.name: opensquilla/opensquilla
github_repos.tldr: Token-efficient AI agent architecture achieving higher intelligence density with the same compute budget. Uses novel context compression and selective attention to maximize reasoning capability per token.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Token 高效的 AI Agent 架构，在相同计算预算下实现更高智能密度。使用新颖的上下文压缩和选择性注意力最大化每 token 推理能力。

hackernews.title: An AI coding agent, used to write code, needs to reduce your maintenance costs
hackernews.tldr: Argues that AI coding agents must prioritize reducing long-term maintenance costs over raw code generation speed. Proposes evaluation criteria focused on code readability, test coverage, and architectural consistency rather than just functionality.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 主张 AI 编码代理必须优先降低长期维护成本而非单纯追求代码生成速度。提出以代码可读性、测试覆盖率和架构一致性为核心的评估标准。

hackernews.title: Telus Uses AI to Alter Call-Agent Accents
hackernews.tldr: Telus deploys AI-powered accent modification for call center agents, raising debates about cultural identity, worker autonomy, and the ethics of voice transformation technology in customer service.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Telus 为呼叫中心代理部署 AI 口音修改技术，引发关于文化认同、工作者自主权和客服语音转换技术伦理的讨论。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Git for AI Agents
hackernews.tldr: re_gent implements version control specifically designed for AI agent workflows — tracking agent decisions, rollbacks, and branching execution paths. Addresses the reproducibility challenge in autonomous agent systems.
hackernews.tldr_zh: re_gent 实现专为 AI Agent 工作流设计的版本控制——追踪代理决策、回滚和分支执行路径。解决自主代理系统中的可复现性挑战。

hackernews.title: Show HN: adamsreview – better multi-agent PR reviews for Claude Code
hackernews.tldr: Multi-agent PR review tool for Claude Code that coordinates multiple AI reviewers for more thorough code analysis. Each agent specializes in different aspects (security, performance, style) for comprehensive reviews.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 面向 Claude Code 的多代理 PR 审查工具，协调多个 AI 审查者进行更全面的代码分析。每个代理专注于不同方面（安全、性能、风格）以实现综合审查。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Stage CLI – An easier way of reading your AI generated changes locally
hackernews.tldr: A CLI tool for reviewing AI-generated code changes locally before committing. Provides a structured diff view with inline annotations to help developers understand and validate agent-produced modifications.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 用于在提交前本地审查 AI 生成代码变更的 CLI 工具。提供带内联注释的结构化差异视图，帮助开发者理解和验证代理产生的修改。
